expectations.evidence: SearchSettingsBaselineForm.php line 11: 'class SearchSettingsBaselineForm extends ConfigFormBase' -- correct base class.

expectations.text: Form class implements getEditableConfigNames() returning array with config name
expectations.evidence: SearchSettingsBaselineForm.php line 16: 'protected function getEditableConfigNames(): array' returns ['search_settings_baseline.settings'].

expectations.text: Route YAML uses _form key (not _controller) for the settings route
config/schema/{module}.schema.yml file exists with typed entries
expectations.evidence: config/schema/search_settings_baseline.schema.yml exists with mapping for similarity_threshold, result_limit, cache_ttl.

expectations.text: Schema types include integer or float types for numeric fields
expectations.evidence: Schema has 'float' for similarity_threshold and 'integer' for result_limit and cache_ttl.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en search_settings returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing search_settings_baseline in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Settings form renders with form fields present
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: page loads, form fields present -- 'Similarity threshold' (0.7), 'Result limit' (5), 'Cache TTL' (300).
